boundary_note: NOT the opus48_quan_one_shot lane final answer (that remains S1 / rejected_selected_area - the ablation measures the one-shot SHIPPED answer). Verdict vocabulary is 'possible headroom / candidate-selection finding', NOT missed-by-Kairos / proposer regression.
provenance: verbatim from the opus48_quan_one_shot raw response; agent-generated then agent-self-rejected in favor of S1 on its own no-mux gate proxy
expression: assign err_unaligned = ((valid_q[1] ? err_q[1] : in_err_i) & ~unaligned_is_compressed) | (valid_q[1] ? err_q[0] : err);  // err = valid_q[0] ? err_q[0] : in_err_i (existing bypass)

packet_base.note: packet recovered from git history; not on current master

instrument_controls: reference-as-is reproduced liberty 456->451; S1 substituted reproduced liberty 456->456 + generic +1 - both match the authoritative packet, so the substitute-and-replay instrument is validated. YOSYS oss-cad-suite-20260630, sky130_fd_sc_hd__tt_025C_1v80.lib.

equivalence.result: 0 mismatches -> COMBINATIONALLY EQUIVALENT, invariant-free. Complete proof for a pure combinational output (err_unaligned feeds out_err_o combinationally).
equivalence.relation_aware_seq_miter: FAILED for F-variant, but that miter is candidate-SPECIFIC (authored for the reference form internal structure); not a valid equivalence verdict for a structurally-different candidate. The exhaustive truth-table is authoritative here.

axes_not_run.sby_abc_pdr: not_run. A-priori: F-variant is combinationally equal to gold on the only changed signal (a combinational output), so reachable-state behavior is identical to gold and the reference PDR pass should carry - but this was NOT executed for F-variant.
axes_not_run.toggle: not_emitted. The packet replay_toggle only sums the reference candidate-specific gold.saif/gate.saif; a sibling needs regenerated SAIF (Dexter caveat).

acceptance_axes_parity: PARTIAL vs the reference packet: equivalence (stronger method) + area + timing RAN; relation-seq-miter + PDR + toggle did NOT run to the reference full pipeline. Do NOT treat as an accepted candidate.
finding: The one-shot raw frontier contained F-variant, whose selected area TIES the Kairos liberty result (451) and BEATS generic (393 vs 395) with flat timing and exhaustive combinational equivalence, while the one-shot SHIPPED S1 (rejected_selected_area). Exposes a candidate-SELECTION / self-proxy-calibration gap in the native one-shot and possible orchestrator headroom on generic. NOT a confirmed missed-by-Kairos until F-variant clears the reference full acceptance pipeline (relation/PDR/toggle).
